name: Spring Pita Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kidney beans, canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the pitas in half.
2. Fill each pita half evenly with diced tomatoes, avocado, kidney beans, grated cheddar cheese, sliced mushrooms, alfalfa sprouts, canola oil, vinegar, and roasted cashews.
3. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
4. Serve immediately, or allow the sandwiches to cool before consuming.
(Note: Even my meat-eating friends and relatives seem to enjoy this when served as a main dish.)
